title: AbracaBando Evaluation Dataset
description: Schema for evaluation datasets used in the abracabando benchmark suite.

judge_prompt_version.description: Identifier of the judge prompt used to score cases (e.g. "haiku-2025-10-v1").

record_id.description: Unique record identifier within the source (e.g. "123456-2025").

converted_to_cn.description: Whether the PIN was followed by a Contract Notice within the follow-on window (TED 3.1 cases).

cn_publication_date.description: Publication date of the follow-on Contract Notice, or null if none / unknown.

status_at_snapshot.description: Status of the record at snapshot time (e.g. "aperto").

D2.description: Scoring strategy for dimension D2 — must always be "deterministic".

D4.description: Scoring strategy for dimension D4 — must always be "deterministic".

skill.description: Primary key: the skill slug this case exercises.

tier.description: frozen = deterministic replay gate; live = scheduled live-data tier.

empty_reason.description: Why ground_truth_records is empty (missing-data / pending-capture cases).

transformation_score_label.description: Qualitative transformation-to-tender label for template 3.3 cases (never numeric).

evidence.description: Explicit evidence strings supporting the transformation label (template 3.3).

id.description: Unique case identifier in the form "<template>-<seq>" (e.g. "3.1-001").

prompt.description: The prompt text sent to the model under evaluation.

parameters.description: Template parameter values used to render the prompt.

snapshot_date.description: ISO 8601 date of the data snapshot used to construct ground truth (YYYY-MM-DD).

frozen_date.description: ISO 8601 date on which the case was frozen / last validated (YYYY-MM-DD).

ttl_days.description: Number of days the case remains valid before a refresh is required.

ground_truth_records.description: Expected records that a correct answer must reference. Empty array is valid when no live records are available for the current snapshot (D2 is then vacuously 1.0).

rubrics.description: Per-dimension scoring strategies for this case.

refresh_instructions.description: Human-readable instructions for refreshing this case when the TTL expires.
